text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, the moon is beautiful tonight! ♪ It's perfect
for practicing magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Heeey! Those clouds are blocking the moon!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No, no, nooo! How am I supposed to know if the
magic worked or not?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh! I'm not moving one inch until the
moonlight comes back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find out later that Sweep Tosho ended up
missing curfew and staying out all night.
